title: Elevated 5xx rate on checkout API
summary: A deploy at 14:02 UTC introduced a null pointer in the discount-code path.

title: Read replica lag spike
summary: Long-running migration on the primary caused 90s of replica lag.

title: Search index out of sync
summary: Kafka consumer offset reset triggered a full re-index that took 4 hours.

title: OAuth token refresh loop
summary: Provider returned 401 instead of 403 for a revoked token; refresh loop retried indefinitely.

title: CDN cache poisoning
summary: A user-controlled query parameter was included in the cache key, allowing cross-tenant content leak.
